name: Top-down arcade — cardinal shooter
description: Top-down arcade shooter in Phaser: WASD cardinal movement in screen-relative axes, shoot enemies, survive.
brief: Build a top-down arcade shooter. The player moves in four cardinal directions with WASD (W is up the screen, S is down, A is left, D is right), aims and fires at enemies that spawn around the arena, and tries to survive as long as possible. Touching an enemy loses a life; losing all lives ends the game.
